overview: Vitali-T provides telehealth and in-person hormone optimization and weight loss services for Oregon and Washington residents using a concierge self-pay model. Patients complete labs at a choice of locations (in-house, home kit, or preferred lab), then consult virtually with providers, receiving free follow-ups every 3-6 months.
highlights: Home lab kit and in-house Eterna Lab & Infusion Suite
Free consultations and follow-ups every 3-6 months
targetAudience: Men with low testosterone symptoms, women in perimenopause or menopause, and rural Oregon and Washington residents.
